metadata.description: Developer productivity plugins from NxGen Tech Solutions

plugins.name: reposcope
plugins.description: Free repo intelligence for any codebase: pattern-based Security scanning and a token-ranked Repo Map — the local-first start of AI Cost Intelligence. Runs fully locally — no account, no key.

plugins.name: reposcope-pro
plugins.description: RepoScope Pro: Cost (model-agnostic token cost per file), Budget (Token Budget Intelligence — context overhead, rules audit, subscription runway, optimization recommendations), Compliance (OWASP/SOC 2/PCI-DSS/ISO 42001/EU AI Act posture from your scan, with audit-ready templates — code-level controls, not certification), plus the AI Game Plan with suggested goals. Requires a RepoScope Pro license.
